comparison.method: Newest article selected by article date from the authenticated category page. The July 13 watchlist/monitoring bucket contained MU, ALAB and SPCX; none reappears in the current article body. IOT appears in the current monitoring table and was absent from the immediately prior watchlist/monitoring bucket, so it is weekly new_watchlist. No continued_watchlist or rejoined_watchlist name is supported by current-article evidence.

sourceNotes: Authenticated Codex in-app browser verified July 20, 2026 as the newest article by article date; source URL is the July 20 post, not lesson order.

Included tickers only when visible in the July 20 article text, financial disclosure, embedded holdings table, or current article body chart images. Sidebar thumbnails, prior/next previews, comments and unrelated page assets were excluded.
Current article holdings table visibly contains MRVL, PANW, CPER, DAVE, DELL, LRCX, KLAC, HOOD and NTAP; Monitoring visibly contains IOT.
Weekly new watchlist: IOT. Prior July 13 new-watchlist names MU, ALAB and SPCX are not carried forward because they are not evidenced in the current article body.
MRVL has a same-article conflict: the dated disclosure says long while the holdings table says Sold. It is retained as position with a manual-verification caveat.

Formal proprietary RS Rating, sales, EPS, industry strength, earnings reaction, base count, late-stage status and pattern confirmation remain Unknown unless directly evidenced. Article language about relative strength is kept as qualitative evidence only.

OHLCV refreshed through the latest confirmed Nasdaq regular-session close on 2026-07-17 for all current article equities plus SPY. The public relative-strength proxy is separate from proprietary RS Rating.

Trend -> Base/Pattern -> Pivot -> Volume -> Risk and Lesson 4 public model-plan rules are applied after export. If a technical stop or pivot cannot be answered, the action remains wait/watchlist rather than buy.
Educational model plans based on daily closing data, not actual positions, live orders or personalized financial advice.

candidates.evidenceOrigin: July 20, 2026 article text, chart image and embedded holdings table
candidates.articleEvidence: The dated disclosure says the author is long MRVL; the holdings table comment says Sold. The article says MRVL lost the 50MA and gap-up support and needs time to form a proper base against $200-$320 overhead resistance.
candidates.chartEvidence: Current body chart shows a sharp post-run decline through the blue support shelf around $216-$220, with price below the short moving averages while the longer MA remains below price. Volume expanded during the decline.
candidates.caveat: Same-article conflict: financial disclosure says long while the table says Sold. Classified as position because the explicit dated disclosure is current; do not add while support and 50MA are lost.
candidates.comment: MRVL: position. The dated disclosure says the author is long MRVL; the holdings table comment says Sold. The article says MRVL lost the 50MA and gap-up support and needs time to form a proper base against $200-$320 overhead resistance. Educational model candidate only, not personalized financial advice.
